description: 'private final' appears only in a Ruby string/heredoc, not as Java code
input:
class CodeExampleHelper
  JAVA_ANTIPATTERN = <<~JAVA
    // Don't do this in a Rails app:
    private final String serviceUrl;
  JAVA

  def render_antipattern_warning
    "Avoid Java patterns like: #{JAVA_ANTIPATTERN.strip}"
  end
end
